x-enumeration-literals.name: Coupon Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Next payment date of an interest bearing financial instrument.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expiry Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date on which a privilege expires.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Floating Rate Fixing Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date at which the interest rate of an interest bearing security will be calculated and reset, according to the terms of the issue.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Maturity Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Planned final repayment date at the time of issuance.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issue Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date at which the security was made available.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Next Callable Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Next date at which the issuer has the right to pay the security prior to maturity.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Putable Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date at which the holder has the right to ask for redemption of the security prior to final maturity.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dated Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: First date at which a security begins to accrue interest.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: First Payment Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date at which the first interest payment is due to holders of the security.(ISO20022)
